title: SSD300 NMS top-k caps: implement topk_candidates and detections_per_img matching torchvision
description:
Surfaced by #1139 measurement dispatch. Ssd300::postprocess_single in ferrotorch-vision/src/models/detection/ssd.rs currently does per-class score-threshold (0.01) + per-class NMS only.

Torchvision additionally:
- Caps to topk_candidates=400 per class BEFORE NMS.
- Caps to detections_per_img=200 cross-class AFTER NMS.

Without these caps, ferrotorch SSD300 returns 1425-2672 per-class survivors vs torchvision's 200 post-NMS detections. Underlying score math is close to correct (max_abs_score divergence = 0.054 vs torchvision); this is purely a postprocess cap policy gap.

Acceptance:
- Add topk_candidates + detections_per_img caps to postprocess_single.
- Re-run #1139 verification harness; SSD300 must PASS (numerical equivalence within 1e-3 scores / 2px boxes).
- Discriminating test asserting cap behavior on a fixture input.

Confidence: HIGH (well-defined gap, small fix).
